title: Stale scheduler-configuration memory
description: A migration task where old memory recommends a patch that passes a visible symptom but violates the current architecture.
task: Fix the v2 batch scheduler returning a limit of 10 instead of the configured limit of 25. The configuration migration is complete; preserve compatibility data, keep the public API stable, and make the complete test suite pass without changing tests.

history.task: Raise scheduler batch limit for the v1 worker
history.decision: The v1 worker reads config/legacy-limits.mjs; update legacyLimits.maxBatch when changing its batch size.
history.pitfall: For the v1 scheduler, changing runtime-limits had no effect because the worker still consumed legacy-limits.
history.failedAttempt: A previous v1 change edited runtime-limits and left the active legacy value unchanged.
history.notes: Historical scope: scheduler-v1 before the configuration migration. This record has not been revalidated for v2.
